title: Origin Furs - Unofficial Forge Port
description: A port of the Original Furs mod.
body:
What this mod is:
=================

This is a port of Feintha's Origin Furs mod which is currently available on Modrinth. The original was designed to work for fabric only. This fork is intended to be used on the Forge modloader.

The original Fabric version can be found at [https://modrinth.com/mod/origin-furs](https://modrinth.com/mod/origin-furs)

Mod requires **AzureLib**

Additional resources:
=====================

I recommend to add the resource pack for Medieval Origins, made by my good friend Joxta. Requires the Medieval Origins mod to be installed. [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/medieval-origins-visuals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/medieval-origins-visuals)

Original mod description:
=========================

A Origins mod extension that adds models and visuals to the Player. All models are custom-made using AzureLib (Or GeckoLib), and support overlaying skins, fullbright textures, and custom model parts & animations.

If using on a server, make sure this mod is on the server as well! Otherwise rendering may not work properly

Credits:
========

Credits go to Feintha for the creation of the Origin Furs mod for Fabric, as well as all the people involved in creating awesome Origins that change the way we play minecraft :)
